description_text: Return Policy Fast Delivery Trusted seller Universal Rear Diffuser Car Spoiler, Rear Bumper Lip Body Canard Spoilers Black Lip Side Skirt Spoiler Splitter Protector Exterior Decoration Trim Kit Anti-Scratch (10.6inch,Carbon Fiber) Product Description 【Reduce Air Resistance】This canard diffuser designed to increase a vehicle's aerodynamic performance. Reduce the adverse airflow generated by the car while driving, increase the downforce and enhance high-speed stability. And protect your vehicle edge from abrasion. 【Excellent Appearance】The Rear Diffuser adopts a canard diffuser side skirt spoiler design, simple and beautiful, highlighting the personalized fashion appearance. Give your vehicle a more aggressive racing look. 【PP Material】Made of high quality PP, waterproof, lightweight, high temperature resistance, corrosion resistance, not easy to break and long-lasting performance. 【Easy DIY Installation】Just clean the place you wanna install, then product may require drilling holes and apply bolts to attach to your bumper. 【Universal】Custom fit most vehicles, please measure the vehicle size before purchg. Accessories include: 2* Car Diffuser, 8* Bolts. Shipping Returns Payment Shipping Shipping is FREE to all addresses other than APO/PO boxes in the lower 48 states. All our stock ships from US-based warehouses. Shipped via USPS or UPS (depending on location and package weight) Unless stated otherwise, all orders will ship within 24-72 hours of your payment being processed. Check our feedback to see the great reviews of FAST shipping we offer.
